generated_oml:
instance DS18S20SensorRoom : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with ±0.5°C accuracy for room temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20SensorInside1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with ±0.5°C accuracy for internal temperature monitoring inside incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperature1DataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20SensorInside2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with ±0.5°C accuracy for internal temperature monitoring inside incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperature2DataTransmitted
]

instance RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20SensorRoom
]

instance InternalTemperature1DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20SensorInside1
]

instance InternalTemperature2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20SensorInside2
]

instance RoomTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time room temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance InternalTemperature1Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature measurement from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperature1DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance InternalTemperature2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature measurement from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperature2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for communication between physical sensors and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance ScipyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy non-linear least squares optimization library for model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService, BangBangControlService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub-hosted open-source code repository for hardware and software specifications"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeManagementService
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transmission of sensor data via RabbitMQ message broker"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration using non-linear least squares optimization with Scipy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models (Model A and B)"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature regulation using bang-bang control logic with configurable upper/lower limits and heating/waiting durations"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureRegulationAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection through temperature deviation monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance CodeManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Code repository management for hardware and software specifications"
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeAvailabilityInsight
]

instance ParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated model parameters for improved prediction accuracy"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values based on thermal models for decision making"
]

instance TemperatureRegulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activate or deactivate heating element and fan based on temperature thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for temperature deviations indicating potential faults"
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data availability for real-time monitoring"
]

instance CodeAvailabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to latest hardware and software specifications from GitHub"
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamic model with parameters C_air and G_box for temperature simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamic model with parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box for temperature simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed with 214×214×3 mm dimensions controlled via MOSFETs driven by Raspberry Pi GPIO"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan operating at 12V/24V with 0.02 m³/s airflow"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for signal isolation and current decoupling"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B used as controller for executing low-level driver and control logic"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, PCB, RaspberryPi4, DS18S20SensorRoom, DS18S20SensorInside1, DS18S20SensorInside2
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands to activate/deactivate heatbed and fan sent via RabbitMQ to the Raspberry Pi controller, which drives MOSFETs on the PCB to control physical actuators based on bang-bang control logic."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized DT constellation comprising RabbitMQ communication server, Raspberry Pi-based controller with bang-bang logic, low-level driver for sensor/actuator interaction, and thermal prediction models with calibration algorithms integrated via message-passing architecture."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase, with models continuously updated to reflect the current state of the physical incubator during active use for thermal regulation and prediction."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through uniform temperature experiments (three sensors) showing maximum 7°C discrepancy without fan voltage adjustment, reduced to 6°C with 18V fan; Model B demonstrated superior prediction of thermal inertia compared to Model A via residual error minimization during calibration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "AMQP-based communication via RabbitMQ message broker between physical controller and DT components, with message queues handling sensor data ingestion and actuator command delivery."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "DT components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B with integrated Wi-Fi and Bluetooth."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol in low-level driver to prevent unsafe states; optocouplers used for electrical isolation between control signals and high-current actuators to ensure operational safety."
]
